DEFENDANT KAY & MERKLE, LLP, DOUGLAS HUTCHINSON DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Kendra L. Tanacea, Esq. of Foreman & Brasso 433-3475 for pltfs & opposing parties; Donald T. McMillan, Esq. of McMillan & Shureen LLP 707/525-5400 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling, courtesy copies of the moving papers provided at the hearing. Upon further review and oral argument, the Court ruled as follows: Demurrer sustained with leave to amend by 12/01/11. Order signed in open court.
